risk_note.tr: Donanım degisikligi. Statik elektrik ve uyumsuz modul riski var. Garantili kanaldan alin.
risk_note.en: Hardware change. Static-discharge and incompatibility risks. Buy from a reputable source.

body.tr: D-Medic > Sistem Detaylari ile RAM miktarini gor. Detay icin: Task Manager > Performance > Memory (Hiz, Slots used, Form factor).
body.en: Check RAM amount via D-Medic > System Details. For details: Task Manager > Performance > Memory (Speed, Slots used, Form factor).

body.tr: Anakart modelini ogren (msinfo32 > System Model) ve ureticinin spec sayfasinda 'Max Memory' degerine bak. Modulu bu sinirin altinda tut.
body.en: Get motherboard model (msinfo32 > System Model), check vendor spec page for 'Max Memory'. Stay below this limit.

body.tr: DDR tipi (DDR4/DDR5), hiz (MHz) ve form factor (DIMM/SODIMM) anakartla eslesmeli. Cift kanal icin ayni kapasiteli iki modul tercih edin.
body.en: DDR type (DDR4/DDR5), speed (MHz), and form factor (DIMM/SODIMM) must match. For dual-channel, prefer two equal modules.

body.tr: Bilgisayari kapat, fisi cek, statigini bosalt (metal yuzeye dokun). Eski modulu klipsleri acarak cikar, yenisini cantik sesi gelene kadar bastir.
body.en: Power off, unplug, ground yourself (touch metal). Release clips to remove old module, press new one until clips snap.

body.tr: Aciyolda BIOS POST ekraninda yeni toplam RAM gorulur. Windows acilinca D-Medic > Sistem Detaylari ile teyit edin. Stabilite testi icin MemTest86.
body.en: BIOS POST should show new total. After Windows boots, verify via D-Medic > System Details. Run MemTest86 for stability test.
